title: ProofEnvelope
description: Cryptographic envelope wrapping a payload with content hashes, chain continuity, and optional Merkle root. Produced and verified by @danteforge/evidence-chain. Frozen at v1.0 with schemaVersion literal 'evidence-chain.v1'; breaking changes to required fields require a new schemaVersion literal and a 2.0 major bump.

schemaVersion.description: Locked literal for the v1.x line. Consumers MUST check this field equals 'evidence-chain.v1' before deserializing.

runId.description: Optional; ties this envelope to a Truth Loop run.

receiptId.description: Optional; identifier for a single receipt within a run.

bundleId.description: Required for EvidenceBundle envelopes; identifies the multi-receipt bundle.

gitSha.description: Optional content-binding to a git commit. When present and non-null, three-way gate verifies the running commit matches.

payloadHash.description: sha256 hex of stableJSON(payload). Tampering with the payload invalidates this hash.

prevHash.description: sha256 hex of the previous envelope's hash field, or ZERO_HASH (64 zeros) for the chain root.

merkleRoot.description: sha256 hex Merkle root of evidence leaves; required for EvidenceBundle, omitted for single Receipt.

verificationStatus.description: Status set by verifier; envelopes ship as 'unverified' and consumers update via verifyReceipt/verifyBundle.
